Multidict implementation.
HTTP Headers and URL query string require specific data structure:
multidict. It behaves mostly like a dict but it can have
several values for the same key.
MultiMapping
MutableMultiMapping)
USE_EXTENSIONS)	r
MultiDictProxy
CIMultiDictProxy
	MultiDict
CIMultiDict
upstr
istr
getversionz
6.0.2)
__doc__
_abcr
_compatr
__all__
__version__
ImportErrorZ
_multidictr
_multidict_pyr	
8/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/multidict/__init__.py
